The following is the orthography and word-shape rules for a hypothetical language: 

=== ORTHOGRAPHY START ===
{orthography}
=== ORTHOGRAPHY END ===

Merge and consolidate the following grammar summaries for this language into a single, coherent description:

{summaries}

Create a unified grammar description that:
1. Combines all information from both summaries
2. Resolves any contradictions by choosing the most detailed version
3. Ensures all example words and paradigms are consistent with the language's writing system.
4. Maintains consistency throughout
5. Organizes information clearly with appropriate headings
6. Removes redundancy while preserving all unique information

Provide no additional explanation. DO NOT include the orthography description provided above.
